tool_purpose: A compact representation of the API for extracting image feature vectors using MobileNetV1 on TensorFlow Hub. Framework: TensorFlow Hub. Functionality: Feature extraction from images. API call: hub.KerasLayer('https://tfhub.dev/google/imagenet/mobilenet_v1_100_224/feature_vector/4').
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
